name: CCS Title Loan Services – LoanMart Bell Gardens
description_short: LoanMart provides auto title loans and title pawns with same-day funding in Bell Gardens, CA. The CCS payment location offers in-person loan payments and ancillary financial services.
description_long:
LoanMart, operating under parent company Wheels Financial Group, LLC, has been serving customers since 2002 and reports having helped over 300,000 customers. The company operates multiple title loan locations across 13 states including California, Texas, Florida, Arizona, and others, with a specific payment processing location in Bell Gardens. They maintain an NMLS ID (1442517) and are subject to state lending regulations and disclosures.

The company offers multiple loan products centered on vehicle collateral: car title loans, online title loans, auto equity loans, title pawns, and title loan refinancing. Their core service model involves using a vehicle's title as collateral to access emergency cash. They advertise a rapid application and funding process, claiming customers who submit documents by 2 pm PT can receive same-day cash. Loan amounts vary based on vehicle year and equity value, calculable through their online tool. Customers can receive funds via direct bank deposit or pick up cash at participating locations.

The Bell Gardens CCS location distinguishes itself by offering extended hours (8 am–9 pm weekdays, 9 am–8 pm Saturday, 9 am–6 pm Sunday) and bundled financial services beyond lending. In addition to title loan payments, the location provides bill payment processing, foreign currency exchange, check cashing, and debit card enrollment. This multi-service approach positions it as a financial services hub rather than a loan-only storefront.

While LoanMart targets underserved consumers (advertising loans for those with bad credit, no income verification, no bank account, and no SSN), title loans carry inherent risks. The collateral model means defaulting borrowers risk vehicle repossession. The website does not disclose APR, fees, or repayment terms, which are critical factors for evaluating cost. The company targets financial emergency situations rather than sustainable credit solutions, and state regulations on title loans vary significantly by jurisdiction.
address: 6810 S Eastern Ave Suite K, Bell Gardens, CA 90201

company_info.headquarters: 6810 S Eastern Ave Suite K, Bell Gardens, CA 90201

pros: Same-day cash funding if documents submitted by 2 pm PT
Accessible to borrowers with bad credit, no income documentation, or no bank account
Extended location hours (8 am–9 pm weekdays, 9 am–8 pm Saturday) for working customers
Multiple loan products (car title loans, auto equity loans, title pawns, refinancing) to match different needs
Bundled financial services at payment location: bill payment, check cashing, currency exchange, debit cards
Online and phone application options for convenience
30+ years operating history (since 2002) and 300,000+ customers served
NMLS licensed and regulated; transparent NMLS ID provided for verification
cons: APR, interest rates, and fee structure not disclosed on website—critical pricing information unavailable to comparison shop
Vehicle title used as collateral; default results in repossession risk
No disclosure of repayment terms, loan amounts, or eligibility requirements on public-facing content
Title loans carry high cost of borrowing and are typically designed for short-term emergency use only
Website does not clarify whether the Bell Gardens location originates loans or handles payments only
best_for: Borrowers with immediate cash needs and vehicle equity who cannot access traditional bank loans
Customers with bad credit, irregular income, or lack of banking relationships seeking same-day funding
Individuals seeking in-person financial services including bill payment and check cashing alongside lending
diagnosis: CCS Title Loan Services – LoanMart Bell Gardens is best for consumers facing immediate financial emergencies who have vehicle equity and cannot access traditional credit. The main caveat is that title loans are high-cost debt instruments with vehicle repossession risk on default; the website does not disclose APR or fees, making it impossible to assess true cost before application. This is appropriate for genuine emergencies only, not ongoing credit needs.
services: Same-day loan funding via direct deposit or cash pickup
In-person title loan payments at physical locations
